title: The Gigantic Camera Watching the Sky

scenes.text: A colossal camera will take 700 photos of the night sky every night!
This 3,200 megapixel camera is part of the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.
It aims to map the entire sky over ten years.
This tool could unlock cosmic mysteries we haven't imagined yet.
scenes.label: UNLOCK COSMIC MYSTERIES

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: The Vera C. Rubin Observatory's massive camera will capture the night sky like never before, revealing cosmic secrets. Follow for daily science!
